title: Man Utd handed Tchouameni boost - Friday's gossip
summary: Real Madrid are open to selling midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni to Manchester United, offering a potential boost for the Premier League club. Transfer speculation also surrounds Arsenal's defensive targets John Stones and Ezri Konsa, while Chelsea, Ipswich Town, and other clubs pursue additional prospects.
content: Real Madrid open to selling Aurelien Tchouameni to Manchester United, Arsenal eye John Stones and Ezri Konsa, Chelsea favourites for Kerim Alajbegovic, Yan Diomande back on radar of Premier League clubs and Daizen Maeda set for Ipswich Town move.

zh.title: 曼联获得切乌阿梅尼机会 - 周五转会八卦
zh.summary: 皇马愿意向曼联出售中场球员奥雷利安·切乌阿梅尼，为这家英超俱乐部提供潜在机会。转会传言还涉及阿森纳对约翰·斯通斯和埃兹里·孔萨的防线目标追求，而切尔西、伊普斯维奇城和其他俱乐部则追求其他前景球员。

title: Defoe leaves Woking after 'eye-opening' first managerial role
summary: Former England and Tottenham striker Jermain Defoe has departed his first managerial role at National League side Woking after four months in charge. Defoe characterized his brief tenure managing nine matches as an instructive, albeit challenging, entry into football management.
content: Former England and Tottenham striker Jermain Defoe has described his first managerial job as an "eye-opening experience" following his departure from National League side Woking after just four months and nine matches in charge.

zh.title: 德福在"大开眼界"的首次执教后离开沃金
zh.summary: 前英格兰和托特纳姆热刺前锋杰梅因·德福在执教英超以外联赛球队沃金四个月后离开了他的首个执教职位。德福将他执教的九场比赛的短暂任期描述为进入足球管理中具有启发但颇具挑战的开始。

title: Can Hibs recover from calamity in Kosovo?
summary: Hibernian suffered a shock 2-0 defeat to Malisheva in Kosovo, severely damaging their Conference League hopes. Manager David Gray acknowledged the team's poor performance, saying they fell "way below the levels required." The loss puts their European qualification prospects in serious jeopardy.
content: Hibernian’s hopes of reaching the Conference League are in jeopardy after a shock 2-0 defeat by Malisheva, with head coach David Gray saying his team "were way below the levels required".

zh.title: 希布斯能否从科索沃的灾难中恢复？
zh.summary: 希布斯在科索沃遭受了对马利舍瓦队的令人震惊的0-2败绩，严重损害了他们的欧洲会议联赛前景。经理大卫·格雷承认球队表现不佳，称他们的水平"远低于所需标准"。这场失利使他们的欧洲资格前景面临严重危险。

title: Italy confirm Ancelotti approach before Guardiola
summary: Italy explored Carlo Ancelotti as a potential national team manager before subsequently opening discussions with Pep Guardiola. The approach reveals the Italian Football Federation's pursuit of elite coaching talent for the national team. This suggests ongoing coaching changes in the national team setup.
content: Italy held discussions with Carlo Ancelotti to become their national team manager before opening talks with Pep Guardiola.

zh.title: 意大利确认在瓜迪奥拉之前接触过安切洛蒂
zh.summary: 意大利在随后与佩普·瓜迪奥拉展开讨论之前，曾探索卡洛·安切洛蒂担任国家队主教练的可能性。这一接触反映了意大利足球协会对国家队精英教练人才的追求。这表明国家队教练结构正在进行持续调整。

title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
summary: Real Madrid legend Luka Modric, at 40 years old and approaching his 41st birthday in September, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan. The deal reflects the midfielder's continued value to the Serie A club despite his advanced age. Modric's longevity at the highest level remains remarkable.
content: AC Milan midfielder Luka Modric - who turns 41 in September - signs a one-year contract extension at the club.

zh.title: 40岁的莫德里奇与AC米兰签署新合同
zh.summary: 皇马传奇球星卢卡·莫德里奇现年40岁，将于9月满41岁，他已与AC米兰签署了一份为期一年的合同延期。这份合同反映了这位中场球员尽管年纪已高但对意甲球队的持续价值。莫德里奇在职业生涯最高水平的表现仍然令人印象深刻。

title: Anderson's journey to England star and  Man City record signing
summary: Elliot Anderson, who played a key role in England's World Cup squad, has become Manchester City's record signing. His transfer represents a major investment by City in the young English talent. This marks a significant milestone in Anderson's career trajectory.
content: Elliot Anderson was a key part of England's World Cup side and is now Manchester City's record signing.

zh.title: 安德森成为英格兰球星和曼城创纪录转会
zh.summary: 埃利奥特·安德森在英格兰世界杯球队中发挥了关键作用，已成为曼城创纪录的签约。他的转会代表了曼城对这位年轻英格兰人才的重大投资。这标志着安德森职业生涯的重要里程碑。

title: 'Motherhood should not be the end of anyone's story'
summary: Nigeria international Ngozi Okobi-Okeoghene has spoken out about the social media backlash she faced after returning to football following childbirth. She highlighted how online users make female players feel pressured about marriage and parenthood, discouraging them from continuing their careers. Her remarks underscore the ongoing struggle for gender equality in professional football.
content: After returning to football after giving birth, Nigeria's Ngozi Okobi-Okeoghene says social media users makes players "feel bad" about getting married and having children.

zh.title: 母性不应该是任何人故事的终结
zh.summary: 尼日利亚国脚恩戈齐·奥科比-奥克奥格纳谈到了分娩后重返足球时遭受的社交媒体反对。她强调了网络用户如何让女性球员感到婚姻和母性的压力，阻止她们继续职业生涯。她的言论突出了职业足球中性别平等的持续问题。

title: Arsenal set to make £70m bid for Newcastle's Guimaraes
summary: Arsenal are preparing a £70 million offer for Newcastle United captain Bruno Guimaraes. The bid signals Arsenal's determination to strengthen their midfield with one of the Premier League's most coveted players. Guimaraes is a key figure in Newcastle's project and any deal would represent a major transfer.
content: Arsenal are set to make a £70m offer for Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes.

zh.title: 阿森纳准备为纽卡斯尔的吉马莱斯出价7000万英镑
zh.summary: 阿森纳正在为纽卡斯尔队长布鲁诺·吉马莱斯准备7000万英镑的报价。这次出价表明了阿森纳加强中场的决心，争取英超最炙手可热的球员之一。吉马莱斯是纽卡斯尔项目的关键人物，任何交易都将代表一笔重大转会。

title: Rangers sign 'huge potential' in Partizan captain Dragojevic
summary: Rangers have signed Serbian midfielder Vanja Dragojevic, 20, from Partizan Belgrade, bringing the Partizan captain to Scottish football. The fee was not disclosed, but the club views the young midfielder as having significant potential. This acquisition represents Rangers' investment in developing youth talent.
content: Rangers sign 20-year-old Serbia midfielder Vanja Dragojevic from Partizan for an undisclosed fee.

zh.title: 流浪者队签下帕特里桑队长德拉戈耶维奇"巨大潜力"
zh.summary: 流浪者队从贝尔格莱德帕特里桑队签下20岁的塞尔维亚中场万贾·德拉戈耶维奇，将帕特里桑队长引入苏格兰足球。转会费未披露，但俱乐部认为这位年轻中场拥有巨大潜力。这次收购代表了流浪者队对发展青年人才的投资。

title: Anderson gets Man City move he craved as £116m deal done
summary: Manchester City have completed the signing of England midfielder Elliot Anderson on a five-year contract for £116 million. Anderson is expected to develop into a "complete midfielder" under City's coaching. The deal represents City's major summer investment in midfield reinforcement.
content: Manchester City confirm the arrival of Elliot Anderson on a five-year deal, as the England player is tipped to become a "complete midfielder" at his new club.

zh.title: 安德森如愿以偿加盟曼城，1.16亿英镑交易完成
zh.summary: 曼城以1.16亿英镑的价格签下英格兰中场埃利奥特·安德森，合同期限五年。安德森预计在曼城教练团队的指导下发展成为"全能中场"。这笔交易代表了曼城在中场加强上的主要夏季投资。

title: Newcastle and Liverpool plan Keegan tribute at season opener
summary: Newcastle United and Liverpool are coordinating a tribute to legendary manager Kevin Keegan ahead of their Premier League opener at St James' Park on August 23rd. The tribute demonstrates the respect both clubs hold for Keegan's historical significance in English football. This marks a notable gesture at the start of the new season.
content: Newcastle United and Liverpool are in discussions over a tribute to Kevin Keegan before their Premier League opener at St James' Park on Sunday 23rd August.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔与利物浦计划在赛季揭幕战中缅怀基冈
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队和利物浦队正在筹划向传奇主教练凯文·基冈致敬，这将在8月23日圣詹姆斯公园球场举行的英超揭幕战前进行。这个致敬活动体现了两支球队对基冈在英格兰足球历史上重要地位的尊重。这是新赛季开始时的一个值得关注的举动。

title: Aberdeen granted permanent alcohol licence
summary: Aberdeen Football Club has received permanent approval from city council to sell alcohol at Pittodrie stadium during matches. The licensing decision provides long-term authorization for beverage sales at the club's home venue.
content: Aberdeen Football Club have been granted a permanent alcohol licence by city council for matches at Pittodrie.

zh.title: 阿伯丁获得永久酒精销售许可
zh.summary: 阿伯丁足球俱乐部从城市议会获得了在比赛期间在皮托德里球场出售酒精的永久批准。该许可决定为俱乐部主场的饮料销售提供了长期授权。

title: Football clubs urged to ease police cost burden on taxpayers
summary: Football clubs are being called upon to contribute more to the costs of match policing to reduce the financial burden on public budgets. New incident figures for the 2025-26 season have prompted the push for greater financial responsibility from clubs. This reflects ongoing debates about security funding and club accountability.
content: Football clubs are urged to contribute more to the cost of match policing to ease the burden on taxpayers, as incident figures for the 2025-26 season are published.

zh.title: 足球俱乐部被敦促减轻警方成本负担
zh.summary: 足球俱乐部被呼吁增加对比赛警务成本的贡献，以减轻公共预算的财务负担。2025-26赛季的新事件数据推动了加强俱乐部财务责任的呼声。这反映了关于安全资金和俱乐部问责的持续争议。

title: Garnacho joins Villa on loan from Chelsea
summary: Aston Villa have signed Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho on loan, with the deal including a clause to make the transfer permanent if certain conditions are met. The move provides Villa with attacking depth while potentially offering Garnacho regular first-team football. This arrangement benefits both clubs in their respective objectives.
content: Aston Villa sign Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho in a loan deal that will become permanent "if certain criteria are met".

zh.title: 加纳乔从切尔西租借加盟维拉
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉从切尔西租借锋线球员亚历杭德罗·加纳乔，该交易包含在特定条件达成时将租借转为永久转会的条款。此举为维拉队提供了进攻深度，同时可能为加纳乔创造稳定的首发机会。这种安排对两家俱乐部的各自目标都有利。

title: Goalkeeper Startup joins WSL newcomers Birmingham
summary: Birmingham City have signed goalkeeper Katie Startup following her departure from Manchester City after her contract expired. Startup joins the newly promoted WSL side as they prepare for their inaugural top-flight season. The signing strengthens Birmingham's squad ahead of their historic entry into women's top-flight football.
content: Birmingham City have signed goalkeeper Katie Startup following her exit from Manchester City when her contract expired.

zh.title: 门神斯塔特普加盟新晋英超女足球队伯明翰城
zh.summary: 伯明翰城足球俱乐部签约门神凯蒂·斯塔特普，她在曼城合同期满后离队。斯塔特普加盟新晋升至女足顶级联赛的球队，该队正在为首个顶级赛季做准备。这次签约为伯明翰队在女足顶级联赛中的历史性首赛季前加强了球队阵容。

title: Gabriel, 15, gets first senior Man Utd call-up
summary: Manchester United teenager JJ Gabriel, 15, has received his first senior squad call-up for an upcoming friendly against Rosenborg on Friday. Gabriel's inclusion marks a significant milestone in his development and suggests he may make his competitive debut. The call-up reflects United's confidence in the young player's potential.
content: Manchester United teenager JJ Gabriel, 15, could make senior debut on Friday after receiving call-up for Rosenborg friendly.

zh.title: 15岁加布里埃尔获得曼联首次一线队征召
zh.summary: 曼联15岁少年JJ加布里埃尔获得了参加周五与罗森博格友谊赛的首次一线队征召。加布里埃尔的入选标志着他职业发展中的重要里程碑，表明他可能会进行职业赛事首秀。这次征召反映了曼联对这位年轻球员潜力的信心。

title: Codina on why she joined West Ham project
summary: Laia Codina explains her decision to transfer to West Ham after three successful years at Arsenal, where she won trophies and developed close team bonds. Her move represents a fresh challenge after establishing herself as a key player at the north London club.
content: Laia Codina won trophies and found a "new family" during her three-year spell at Arsenal - but she was ready for a change with West Ham.

zh.title: 科迪娜解释为何加入西汉姆项目
zh.summary: 莱娅·科迪娜解释了她从阿森纳转会到西汉姆的决定，在阿森纳的三年里她赢得了多个奖杯并建立了紧密的球队纽带。在确立自己作为伦敦北部俱乐部关键球员的地位后，她的转会代表了一个新的挑战。

title: Arsenal sign Greece forward Tzolis for £34m
summary: Arsenal has completed the signing of Greek forward Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34 million. The versatile attacking player strengthens Arsenal's offensive options ahead of the new season.
content: Arsenal sign "extremely versatile attacking player" Christos Tzolis from Club Brugge for £34m.

zh.title: 阿森纳以3400万英镑签约希腊前锋特佐利斯
zh.summary: 阿森纳已经从布鲁日俱乐部以3400万英镑完成了对希腊前锋克里斯托斯·特佐利斯的签约。这位多才多艺的进攻球员在新赛季前加强了阿森纳的进攻选择。

title: Iraola in talks with clubs before Liverpool move
summary: Newly appointed Liverpool manager Andoni Iraola reveals he was negotiating with multiple clubs before the Reds moved quickly to secure him for Anfield. His swift appointment underscores Liverpool's determination to hire their primary managerial target.
content: New Liverpool manager Andoni Iraola says he was in talks with other clubs before the Reds swooped - then "things moved quite fast" to take him to Anfield.

zh.title: 伊拉奥拉在加入利物浦前与多家俱乐部进行谈判
zh.summary: 新任利物浦经理安东尼·伊拉奥拉透露，在红军迅速确保他加入安菲尔德之前，他正在与多家俱乐部进行谈判。他的迅速任命强调了利物浦对聘请他们主要目标经理的决心。

title: Norway consider complaint over Balogun World Cup ban suspension
summary: Norway's Football Federation is considering filing a formal complaint to FIFA's ethics committee over a Balogun World Cup ban suspension. The move reflects the federation's dispute with the disciplinary decision.
content: The Norwegian Football Federation is considering filing a formal complaint to Fifa's ethics committee.

zh.title: 挪威考虑就巴洛冈世界杯禁赛提出申诉
zh.summary: 挪威足球协会正在考虑向国际足联伦理委员会提出正式申诉，反对对巴洛冈的世界杯禁赛处罚。此举反映了该协会对这一纪律处分决定的异议。

title: Can Emery work his magic again at Villa?
summary: Aston Villa face the challenge of competing in the Champions League while losing influential midfielders Morgan Rogers and Youri Tielemans. Manager Unai Emery must prove he can sustain the club's success without these key performers.
content: Aston Villa are back in the Champions League but must now cope with the loss of key players Morgan Rogers and Youri Tielemans.

zh.title: 埃梅里能否在阿斯顿维拉再施展魔力？
zh.summary: 阿斯顿维拉面临在欧冠中竞争的挑战，同时失去了有影响力的中场球员摩根·罗杰斯和约里·蒂莱曼斯。主教练乌奈·埃梅里必须证明他能在没有这些关键球员的情况下维持俱乐部的成功。

title: England U16 player fight was resolved quickly - FA
summary: The FA confirms that a fight between two players at an England Under-16s training camp was an isolated "internal matter" that was quickly resolved. The incident reflects typical competitive tensions that occasionally arise in youth football.
content: The FA says a fight between two players at an England Under-16s camp was caused by an "internal matter".

zh.title: 英格兰U16球员冲突迅速解决 - 足协
zh.summary: 英足总确认，在英格兰U16训练营中发生的两名球员之间的冲突是一起孤立的"内部事务"，已迅速得到解决。该事件反映了青少年足球中偶尔出现的典型竞争紧张局势。

title: Hull City owner 'disturbed' by transfer claims
summary: Hull City owner Acun Ilicali has publicly disputed claims that transfer targets have rejected the club, stating he is "disturbed" by the narrative. His public intervention is an unusual attempt to defend the club's reputation during the transfer window.
content: Hull City owner Acun Ilicali says he is "disturbed" by claims of the club being rejected by transfer targets and, in an unusual move, attempted to clarify the situation.

zh.title: 赫尔城老板对转会传言感到"困扰"
zh.summary: 赫尔城老板阿昆·伊利卡利公开否认了转会目标拒绝加盟该俱乐部的说法,称他对这种舆论感到"困扰"。他的公开回应是在转会窗口期间维护俱乐部声誉的不寻常举动。

title: Leeds in talks to sign Man City keeper Trafford
summary: Leeds United is in negotiations with Manchester City to acquire goalkeeper James Trafford. The potential move would provide Leeds with experienced depth between the posts for their upcoming campaign.
content: Leeds United are in discussions with Manchester City to sign goalkeeper James Trafford.

zh.title: 利兹联正在谈判签下曼城门神特拉福德
zh.summary: 利兹联正在与曼城谈判以获得门神詹姆斯·特拉福德。这一潜在转会将为利兹联即将到来的赛季提供经验丰富的门神储备。

title: Pandur joined Rangers after Hull planned new number one
summary: Rangers' new goalkeeper Ivor Pandur chose his move to Ibrox over remaining with Hull City, which had informed him they intended to sign a replacement keeper. Pandur's decision reflects the intense competition for playing time among goalkeepers at major clubs.
content: New Rangers goalkeeper Ivor Pandur says he passed up the chance to be part of Hull City's return to the Premier League after being told they planned to sign a new number one this summer.

zh.title: 潘德尔在赫尔城计划寻找新门神后加入流浪者队
zh.summary: 流浪者队的新门神伊沃尔·潘德尔选择加入埃布罗克斯,而非继续留在赫尔城,赫尔城曾告知他们计划签下替补门神。潘德尔的决定反映了顶级俱乐部门神争夺上场时间的激烈竞争。

title: Newcastle agree £34m deal for Monaco's Bamba
summary: Newcastle United has agreed a £34 million deal with Monaco for midfielder Aladji Bamba, who is scheduled to arrive for medical tests and contract finalization. The acquisition strengthens Newcastle's midfield options for the upcoming season.
content: Midfielder Aladji Bamba is due to arrive on Thursday for a medical and to sign a long-term contract.

zh.title: 纽卡斯尔与摩纳哥达成3400万英镑转会班巴协议
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队已与摩纳哥达成3400万英镑的协议，签下中场球员阿拉吉·班巴，他将前往进行体检和合同最终确认。这次引援加强了纽卡斯尔在即将到来的赛季的中场选择。

title: Ruiz & Gavi's reward for World Cup win... 150kg of tomatoes
summary: Spain's World Cup-winning players Fabian Ruiz and Gavi receive their body weight in tomatoes upon returning to their hometown of Los Palacios y Villafranca. This traditional celebratory reward highlights the homecoming of the Spanish stars following their tournament success.
content: Spain's Fabian Ruiz and Gavi receive their body weight in tomatoes when they return to their hometown Los Palacios y Villafranca.

zh.title: 鲁伊斯和加维的世界杯胜利奖励...150公斤番茄
zh.summary: 西班牙世界杯冠军球员法比安·鲁伊斯和加维回到家乡洛斯帕拉西奥斯-比拉弗兰卡后获得与其体重相同的番茄作为传统庆祝奖励。这突显了这两位西班牙明星在赛事成功后的荣归故里。

title: 'Rangers lead chase for Sturm's Fosso' - gossip
summary: Rangers are reportedly pursuing Ryan Fosso from Austrian club Sturm Graz in a competitive transfer market. Other Scottish clubs remain active, with Dundee United linked to Will Ferry and Aberdeen targeting Hibernian's Chris Cadden.
content: Rangers are reportedly leading the chase to sign Ryan Fosso from Sturm Graz, while Dundee United's Will Ferry is linked with Celtic and Aberdeen are said to want Hibernian's Chris Cadden.

zh.title: '流浪者队领先追逐施图姆的福索' - 转会传闻
zh.summary: 据报道，流浪者队正在竞争激烈的转会市场中追求奥地利俱乐部施图姆格拉茨的瑞恩·福索。其他苏格兰俱乐部仍然活跃，邓迪联队与威尔·费里有关联，阿伯丁则瞄准希伯尼安的克里斯·卡德恩。

title: Listen: Will Hibs & Well deliver in Europe? Is McInnes ban fair?
summary: Hibernian and Motherwell begin their European campaigns with analysts questioning whether both Scottish sides can progress. The discussion also addresses the fairness of McInnes' recent ban.
content: Hibs and Motherwell begin their European campaigns. Can both progress?

zh.title: 听：希伯尼安和莫瑟韦尔能在欧洲中突出重围吗？麦金尼斯禁赛公平吗？
zh.summary: 希伯尼安和莫瑟韦尔开始他们的欧洲赛事，分析人士质疑这两支苏格兰球队是否能够晋级。讨论还涉及麦金尼斯最近禁赛的公平性。

title: Who am I? Guess Premier League star No 3
summary: BBC Football presents a guessing game challenging readers to identify a Premier League player in as few attempts as possible. The interactive feature tests fan knowledge of top-flight stars.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜英超明星第3号
zh.summary: BBC足球推出一款猜谜游戏，挑战读者在尽可能少的尝试次数内识别一名英超球员。这个互动功能测试球迷对顶级联赛球星的了解程度。

title: One month, two record transfers - why English midfielders are in demand
summary: English midfielders Elliot Anderson and Morgan Rogers both commanded record transfer fees within a month, reflecting heightened demand for homegrown talent. The spike underscores the premium clubs are placing on English midfield options in the current market.
content: Elliot Anderson and Morgan Rogers both sold for record transfer fees, so why are English midfielders so in demand?

zh.title: 一个月，两笔破纪录转会——为什么英格兰中场球员需求旺盛
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员埃利奥特·安德森和摩根·罗杰斯在一个月内都创造了创纪录的转会费，反映了对本土天才的需求增加。这个激增凸显了俱乐部在当前市场上对英格兰中场选手的重视。
